description: An OCC controller is monitoring a trans-oceanic flight to ensure it remains on its planned route and schedule.

nodes.task_description: Track the flight's position in real-time on a map display.
Receive periodic position reports from the flight crew via satellite datalink.

expected_outcome.value: Agent receives and acknowledges the reports.

nodes.task_description: Compare the flight's actual fuel burn to the planned fuel burn and note any significant deviations.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the fuel burn is nominal and the flight has enough fuel to reach its destination.
